subject: feat(debug): add PWA lifecycle logs, embed success log, reduce noise
body:
- Add debug logs to usePWAInstall: early-prompt-captured, prompt-captured,
  prompt-shown, prompt-result (accepted/dismissed), app-installed
- Add debug logs to usePWAUpdate: sw-registered (with state), update-available,
  update-applied
- Add success log to useRepoTorEmbed when embed.js loads (was error-only)
- Remove static constants (apiUrl, timeoutMs, maxAttempts) from InterestForm
  submit log to reduce noise — these never change between submissions

All PWA logs use the existing 'PWA' DebugSource type which was previously
defined but unused.

Tags: debug, pwa, logging, embed
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-coverage
Semver: patch
